dealSummary: Anthropic is in talks to raise a $30 billion round at a $900 billion valuation, Bloomberg reported.
Defense tech startup Anduril raised a $5 billion round led by Thrive Capital and Andreessen Horowitz at a $61 billion valuation.
Germany-based drone startup Quantum Systems is in talks to raise a €600 million round from investors including Airbus and Blackstone at a valuation close to €7 billion, Bloomberg reported.
Mind Robotics, the developer of an industrial robotics platform, secured a $400 million round led by Kleiner Perkins.
Wispr AI, the developer of an AI voice dictation tool, is in talks to raise a $260 million round led by Menlo Ventures at a $2 billion valuation, Bloomberg reported.
Oishii, which operates an indoor vertical farm for strawberries, raised a $150 million Series C led by SPARX Asset Management.

company: German quantum-powered medical imaging specialist NVision
dealSummary: German quantum-powered medical imaging specialist NVision raised a $55 million Series B led by Abbott.
Judgment Labs, a startup building infrastructure for evaluating AI agents, received $32 million across its seed and Series A rounds led by Lightspeed.

Revenue infrastructure developer Roadrunner raised $27 million across a seed round led by Kleiner Perkins and a Series A led by Founders Fund.9amHealth, the operator of a virtual care platform for cardiometabolic care, secured a $26 million Series B led by Define Ventures.
leadInvestors: Kleiner Perkins, a Series A led by Founders Fund

dealSummary: Pharmaceutical marketing platform developer BranchLab raised a $26 million Series A led by McKesson Ventures.
Webidoo, a Milan-based startup building an AI operating layer for small and midsized businesses, received $25 million in a round led by Azimut Libera Impresa.
